name: Glider
notes: Pure scout, cannot attack at all. Unpowered — unlike every other Air-domain unit it draws Food upkeep instead of Fuel, same as ground infantry (see game-design/03-resources.md). empImmune: an unpowered glider has no engine for Signal Ridge's EMP Turret to disable, unlike every other Air-domain unit (see game-design/05-troop-stat-schema.md's Status Effects section).
